description.en: Maps network layer addresses (IP) to link layer addresses (MAC) within a local network. Essential for Ethernet communication between hosts on the same subnet.
description.zh: 将网络层地址（IP）映射为链路层地址（MAC）。局域网内同一子网主机间以太网通信的基础。

hardwareSize.en: Hardware address length in bytes (6 for Ethernet MAC)
hardwareSize.zh: 硬件地址长度（字节），以太网MAC为6

protocolSize.en: Protocol address length in bytes (4 for IPv4)

opcode.zh: 操作码 (1=请求 who-has, 2=应答 is-at)

targetMAC.en: Target hardware address, zero in requests
targetMAC.zh: 目标硬件地址，请求时为0

targetIP.zh: 目标协议地址 (待解析的IP)
